prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年高热推荐），与吉林大学优势学科高度契合；宁夏2025年物理类考生约44491人，2026年总考生约66000人（按历史物理类占比约67.5%估算，物理类约44550人），考生规模与2025年基本持平；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区，在宁夏招生占比约0.5%-0.8%（2024年宁夏招生约9人占全校0.0119，2025年约12人占0.0201），跨省招生比例较小，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次前移趋势、2026年缩招约9.2%（缓解竞争）、声誉负面事件（抑制报考热情）及考生规模基本持平；考虑声誉负面事件可能对部分考生产生心理影响，适度上调位次至3332名。预测2026年理科（物理类）最低位次约3332名，波动区间2857-3807名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 2322, in 2023 approximately 3923 (a significant drop of about 1600), in 2024 approximately 5857 (a further drop of about 1934), and in 2025 the lowest rank for physics category was approximately 3474 (an advance of about 2383 compared to 2024). Rankings have fluctuated sharply over the past 4 years, with a clear advance in 2025, baseline rank approximately 3474; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Ningxia: 74 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 66 in 2024, 76 in 2025, and 69 in 2026. In 2026, enrollment decreased by 7 (about 9.2%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly and putting downward pressure on rank numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 26th, with stable rankings between 24-27 in recent years, making it a top national comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'clearly negative', mainly involving campus safety incidents (13 negative incidents including theft in the Qianwei campus bathhouse), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure; the 2025 abnormal admission signal is 'medium concern', with ranking drops in Jiangsu physics category and Heilongjiang clinical group; 15 disciplines including Marxist Theory A+, Archaeology A+, Law A, Chemistry A, Mathematics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Physics A, Veterinary Medicine A, and Computer Science and Technology A- have been rated A- or above, indicating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended in 2024), closely aligned with Jilin University's advantageous disciplines; in 2025, Ningxia had approximately 44,491 physics category candidates, and in 2026, total candidates are approximately 66,000 (estimated physics category about 44,550 based on historical physics category proportion of about 67.5%), with candidate scale roughly the same as 2025; Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region, with enrollment in Ningxia accounting for about 0.5%-0.8% (in 2024, about 9 students enrolled in Ningxia, accounting for 0.0119% of the total; in 2025, about 12 students, accounting for 0.0201%), a small cross-province enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking advance trend, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 9.2% (easing competition), negative reputation events (suppressing application enthusiasm), and candidate scale being roughly flat; considering that negative reputation events may psychologically affect some candidates, moderately adjust the rank upward to 3332. Predict that the 2026 lowest rank for science (physics category) will be approximately 3332, with a fluctuation range of 2857-3807.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum rank for liberal arts was approximately 389; in 2023, approximately 2957 (a significant backward shift of about 2568 places); in 2024, approximately 1011 (a forward shift of about 1946 places); in 2025, the minimum rank for history category was approximately 693 (a forward shift of about 318 places compared to 2024). Rankings have fluctuated greatly over the past 4 years, but the continuous forward shift from 2024 to 2025 indicates intensifying competition, with a baseline rank of about 693. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Ningxia: 13 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 20 in 2025, and 20 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or contraction, thus no direct supply-demand impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 26th, with stable rankings between 24th and 27th in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly involving campus safety incidents (13 negative events such as theft in bathhouses), which may suppress some application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with moderate exposure. The abnormal signal for 2025 admissions is 'medium concern', with rank declines in Jiangsu and Heilongjiang. Law is rated A, Marxist Theory A+, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Archaeology A+, with outstanding strength in liberal arts disciplines, strongly attracting applications for majors like law and political science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social popularity of 'divided wait-and-see' (2024), but Jilin University's law is an A-level discipline, one of the Five Institutes and Four Schools, so application enthusiasm remains high. Journalism and Communication is 'significantly discouraged'. In 2025, Ningxia had approximately 21,406 history category examinees; in 2026, total examinees are about 66,000 (estimated history category about 21,450, assuming about 32.5% history proportion), with basically the same number of examinees. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, and its liberal arts enrollment in Ningxia is very small (about 0.3%-0.5%), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward shift trend from 2024 to 2025 (intensifying competition), the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, basically the same number of examinees, and negative reputation events (which may suppress some application enthusiasm); and considering the recent trend of intensifying competition in liberal arts, the rank is moderately adjusted downward to 663 (a smaller rank number means harder to enter). It is predicted that the minimum rank for the 2026 liberal arts (history category) will be approximately 663, with a fluctuation range of 569-757.
